title: ceropegia boonjarasii
intro: Ceropegia boonjarasii, also known as the Thai Violet or Queen of the Night, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to Thailand. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Ceropegia boonjarasii include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it potentially useful in the management of various health conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and skin problems. In herbal preparations, Ceropegia boonjarasii is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical applications, and it is also used in traditional Thai medicine to treat various ailments.
